rulings.Case Title: KONSTANTIN KUPFER VS. FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 29, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint. rulings.Case Title: MARK TANNER CONSTRUCTION, INC. et al VS. MAJESTIC CAPITAL LTD. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 29, 2011, line 14. DEFENDANT MAJESTIC INSURANCE COMPANY, EMBARCADERO INSURANCE HOLDINGS, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend: as to 1st and 2nd causes of action to allege misrepresentation made by moving defendants. 5th cause of action to allege elements of UFTA cause of action, 6th cause of action to allege a RICO violation not preempted by McCarren-Ferguson Act with particularity. 7th cause of action to allege contract between plaintiffs and moving defendants. =(302/LMG)
